title: 深色模式顶部按钮复现
goal: 在已安装包基础上复现右侧顶部四个按钮在深色模式下不可见问题，确认页面和按钮数量，收集截图与UI证据，不做修复
latestSummary: Verified in reuse-installed-build mode on pages/MainPage. Switched to dark theme and reproduced that the top-right window controls (menu, maximize/restore, minimize, close) are low-contrast against the dark title bar. Evidence captured in screenshots/ctest-after-theme-toggle-attempt.png and screenshots/ctest-darkmode-topright-crop.png.
